metadata.comment:
Rationale: Fig.4: "Strong activation of synaptic NMDARs induced hippocalcin-YFP translocation to dendritic spines."
Fig.5: "Activation of synaptic and total pools of NMDARs resulted in differential hippocalcin-YFP signalling in spines."
Fig.6: "Intrinsic bursts of network activity induced hippocalcin-YFP translocation to dendritic spines". Experimental description: Experiments were done rats
Literal "Neurons were obtained from newborn Wistar rats ..."

17/11/2017 Pim
- Overexpressed protein is of rat species (traced back to PIMID:11836243): "The EYFP-tagged hippocalcin fusion construct (pHippo-EYFP) was made by the in-frame insertion of a hippocalcin sequence, amplified from rat brain cDNA, ..."
